address: 547 Lydia Ct. South Rohnert Park CA 94928
description: Comprehensive plumbing service for a Rohnert Park home including: new outdoor hose bib installation with copper lines, water hammer arresters on washing machine lines to eliminate pipe noise, bathtub drain and overflow replacement, tub spout repair, and two toilet replacements with new flanges and supply lines.
originalDescription:
Task 1 
Install new hose bib in backyard from under house. Make wall penetration near side gate to center hose bib, with copper escutcheon. All lines run in copper and soldered. Task 2
Installed water hammer arresters to washing machine water lines and secured main copper underneath house to stop the hammering noise while running the washing machine. Task 3
Removed and replaced bathtub waste and overflow including chrome trim for drain/stopper and overflow cover. I cut out drain underneath. Replaced entire drain assembly and installed new trim. Task 4
Replaced broken tub spout in hall with customer supplied spout to fix leak running through wall.Task 5
Remove old and installed new toilet for hall bathroom. Removed old toilet and disposed, then set customer provided new toilet. Includes wax ring, new supply line and caulking to seal to floorTask 6 not in original estimate. 
Removed master bathroom toilet to find rusted flange unusable for reinstallation. Cut out drain and replaced coupling, 90 and toilet flange. Set customer supplied toilet. Includes new supply line, wax ring, and caulking around base. 3 hours includes building toilet replacing drain, setting flange, caulking and testing.

description: Complete water main replacement for a San Anselmo home. Replaced broken galvanized line at the meter, installed new underground water lines to the house, and reconnected main irrigation lines in the side yard. review.text: We have been in our San Anselmo home for 45 years and have done major remodels and countless simple home repairs. Hands down Chris at Goflow was the best plumbing contractor we've used and I know them all. We required a full water supply line replacement that was a challenging project. He was knowledgeable, persistent, and hardworking...and the pricing was very reasonable. Highly recommend.

originalDescription:
(Phase 1) Completed: Cut out broken galvanized line at meter and restore water to house through temporary hose line. Call in line location and look for lines in ground. 5 hours. (Phase 2) Completed. New lines are installed underground to new locations we will reconnect main water under house and reconnect main irrigation lines in side yard. 

New 1.25" backflow device to be installed at meter to run house and irrigation. Approx. 30 feet of pipe under house for main line. 10 ft PVC for irrigation lines. 8 Hours
